DP.115.0000:
All my grandchildren are clamoring
for Pokémon of their own.\f
It may be tricky to manage it, but
it will brighten up the mood more.
DP.115.0001:
Oh, no, there are no stairs in
this house. It’s easier that way.\f
The lack of stairs makes it easy for
the little Pokémon to get about.
DP.115.0002:
A world in which people are
compassionate to others...\f
That’s all that matters to me.
DP.115.0003:
Hearthome is a kid-friendly city,
they say, but I disagree.\f
Hearthome is friendly to kids,
grown-ups, and Pokémon too.
